title: Senior Teacher - Anna University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Anna University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Anna University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Anna University:
Anna University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University!
